## Summary

Describe the problem and the outcome of this change.

## Trust boundaries

- [ ] Authentication and authorization remain fail-closed.
- [ ] Scientific provenance and integrity metadata are preserved.
- [ ] AI output remains advisory and cannot bypass human review.
- [ ] Released artifacts and append-only records remain immutable.
- [ ] No credentials, private data, or generated local artifacts are included.

## Verification

List tests, Compose checks, migrations, or manual verification performed.

## Documentation

- [ ] Documentation was updated, or no documentation change is required.
